description: Catalog of every documented upstream artifact under data/upstream/data-stfc-space. Per-file JSON is listed except bulk directories (ships/*.json, hostiles/*.json), which are described by pattern only.

bulk_patterns_not_individually_documente.semantics: Per-hull ship detail from data.stfc.space (tiers, components, levels, refits, scrap). Same schema for every id; see mapping/ships.json.
Per-hostile combat/detail JSON (components, stats, systems, warp). Same schema per hostile id; see mapping/hostiles.json.

directories.note: This folder; JSON mapping for AI and tooling.

markdown_docs.description: How to resolve buff_<id> and loca_id to human-readable stats and Kobayashi engine stat keys.
Cumulative vs incremental building buff values in summary-building.json (esp. building 70).

fields.ships: array of { numeric_id, id, ship_name, ship_class }

registry_files.description: Hull numeric_id to Kobayashi ship slug/id and display name; built by scripts/build_ship_registry.py from summary-ship + translations-ships.

summaries.description: Starbase buildings: max_level, unlock_level, buffs[] with per-level cumulative values. Used by import_stfcspace_buildings.mjs.
Consumable items: rarity, grade, slot, buff reference, duration, category, art_id, loca_id.
Forbidden tech entries: type, subtype, tech_type, tier_max, rarity, buffs[] (template buff ids for FT progression).
summaries.kobayashi: Related to data/forbidden_chaos_tech.json / import flow; not 1:1.

summaries.description: Space hazard types: id_str, name, effect, type (TYPE_A–F).
Hostile index row per spawnable hostile: faction, level, ship_type, loca_id, hull_type, rarity, count, strength, systems[], warp, resources. Detail in hostiles/{id}.json.
Missions: faction, recommended_level (field name typo recommeded_level in upstream), rewards, pickup_systems, warp distances to mission and completion.
Officer catalog rows (ids, loca, faction, abilities). Kobayashi abilities: LCARS.
Research nodes: unlock_level, tree, row/column, buffs summary; per-level values from research/{id}.json API.
Game resources/materials: grade, rarity, resource_id, art_id, loca_id, sorting_index.
Playable hull index: hull_type, max_tier, max_level, build costs, faction, loca_id. Detail in ships/{id}.json.
Star systems / map nodes: coords, faction, level, mines, planets, hostiles[], hazards, wave_defense flags, warp estimates.
Wave defense instances: id_str, required_level, total_waves.

translations.description: Blueprint-related UI strings; keys tie to blueprint assets. Used with ship/blueprint loca flows (e.g. build_hull_id_registry fallback).
Names and descriptions for consumables (summary-consumable loca_id).
Event title strings for limited-time events.
Faction display names and related copy (faction loca_ids across summaries).
Forbidden tech names and buff copy (summary-forbidden_tech loca_ids).
Heads-up display and general UI strings.
Loyalty / reputation related text.
Resource and material display names (summary-ressource loca_id).
Mission titles and mission-related copy (missions use loca across game data).
Navigation and map UI strings.
Officer ability/buff names and descriptions.
Officer biography and flavor text.
Officer display names (primary name table for officers).
Additional officer-related strings (roles, UI).
Player avatar and portrait related strings.
Research node names and descriptions (summary-research / detail loca_id).
Ship-wide buff labels (hull abilities, refits, ship buff loca).
Component names for ship tiers (warp, shield, weapon loca_ids).
Ship hull names (key ship_name); primary name table for summary-ship.
Starbase module and building names (starbase_module_name); building bid resolution.
System/sector names on the galaxy map.
Trait labels (officer/ship traits where applicable).
